title: Marius Diță

infobox.value: This biographical article related to association football in Romania, about a defender born in the 1970s, is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Marius_Di%C8%9B%C4%83&action=edit).

(born 15 August 1975) is a Romanian former professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who played as a [defender](/wiki/Defender_(association_football) "Defender (association football)") and [midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder"). In his career Diță played in the [Liga I](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") for [FC Argeș Pitești](/wiki/FC_Arge%C8%99_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Argeș Pitești"), but mainly in the [Liga II](/wiki/Liga_II "Liga II") and [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III") for teams such as [FC Bihor Oradea](/wiki/FC_Bihor_Oradea_(1958) "FC Bihor Oradea (1958)"), [Dacia Mioveni](/wiki/CS_Mioveni "CS Mioveni"), [Gloria Bistrița](/wiki/ACF_Gloria_Bistri%C8%9Ba "ACF Gloria Bistrița"), [Universitatea Cluj](/wiki/FC_Universitatea_Cluj "FC Universitatea Cluj") or [Atletic Bradu](/wiki/CS_Atletic_Bradu "CS Atletic Bradu"), among others.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)
["Marius Diţă îşi încheie cariera cu piciorul rupt"](http://jurnaluldearges.ro/marius-dita-isi-incheie-cariera-cu-piciorul-rupt/). jurnaluldearges.ro.

first_paragraph: **Marius Diță** (born 15 August 1975) is a Romanian former professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who played as a [defender](/wiki/Defender_(association_football) "Defender (association football)") and [midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder"). In his career Diță played in the [Liga I](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") for [FC Argeș Pitești](/wiki/FC_Arge%C8%99_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Argeș Pitești"), but mainly in the [Liga II](/wiki/Liga_II "Liga II") and [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III") for teams such as [FC Bihor Oradea](/wiki/FC_Bihor_Oradea_(1958) "FC Bihor Oradea (1958)"), [Dacia Mioveni](/wiki/CS_Mioveni "CS Mioveni"), [Gloria Bistrița](/wiki/ACF_Gloria_Bistri%C8%9Ba "ACF Gloria Bistrița"), [Universitatea Cluj](/wiki/FC_Universitatea_Cluj "FC Universitatea Cluj") or [Atletic Bradu](/wiki/CS_Atletic_Bradu "CS Atletic Bradu"), among others.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

**Marius Diță** (born 15 August 1975) is a Romanian former professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who played as a [defender](/wiki/Defender_(association_football) "Defender (association football)") and [midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder"). In his career Diță played in the [Liga I](/wiki/Liga_I "Liga I") for [FC Argeș Pitești](/wiki/FC_Arge%C8%99_Pite%C8%99ti "FC Argeș Pitești"), but mainly in the [Liga II](/wiki/Liga_II "Liga II") and [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III") for teams such as [FC Bihor Oradea](/wiki/FC_Bihor_Oradea_(1958) "FC Bihor Oradea (1958)"), [Dacia Mioveni](/wiki/CS_Mioveni "CS Mioveni"), [Gloria Bistrița](/wiki/ACF_Gloria_Bistri%C8%9Ba "ACF Gloria Bistrița"), [Universitatea Cluj](/wiki/FC_Universitatea_Cluj "FC Universitatea Cluj") or [Atletic Bradu](/wiki/CS_Atletic_Bradu "CS Atletic Bradu"), among others.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)
